scenario.name: S1 INVITE loop
scenario.send:
INVITE sip:9999@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: "S1-[call_number]" <sip:[call_number]@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: <sip:9999@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 INVITE Contact: <sip:[call_number]@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Max-Forwards: 70 User-Agent: SIPp/S1 Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=- 53655765 2353687637 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[local_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 0 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000

ACK sip:9999@asterisk:5060 SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: "S1-[call_number]" <sip:[call_number]@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: <sip:9999@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]>[peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 ACK Contact: <sip:[call_number]@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Length: 0

BYE sip:9999@asterisk:5060 SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: "S1-[call_number]" <sip:[call_number]@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: <sip:9999@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]>[peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 2 BYE Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Length: 0
